nasb.text: The name of the star is called Wormwood; and a third of the waters became wormwood, and many men died from the waters, because they were made bitter.

esv.text: The name of the star is Wormwood. A third of the waters became wormwood, and many people died from the water, because it had been made bitter.

cnv.text: 這星名叫“苦堇”。眾水的三分之一變為“苦堇”，因水變苦，就有許多人因為這水而死了。

ccb.text: 这颗星名叫“苦艾”，它使三分之一的水都变苦了，许多人因为喝了这种苦水而死去。

csbs.text: 这颗星的名字叫“苦艾”。于是众水的三分之一变为苦艾，许多人就因这水变苦而死去了。
